calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Petition To Correct Contractual Arbitration Award Pursuant To Ccp 1285.2
Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

RESPONDENT ARIF CAMAL's Motion To Dismiss Petition To Correct Contractual Arbitration Award Pursuant To CCP 1285.2 is Granted. No opposition filed.

The court signed the proposed order included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
